items.title: The Garage Abu Dhabi | Fine Dining Brand Film
description: A fine dining brand film for The Garage Abu Dhabi, created to capture the venue’s atmosphere, service moments, and premium dining experience.
The piece seamlessly blends cinematic wide shots of the space with close-ups of plated dishes and drink moments, building mood, appetite, and a clear sense of place.
Designed as a polished hospitality asset for digital platforms and brand marketing use.

items.title: Prev Post
description: A simple fashion promo for Tanashy Design, featuring a model-led visual built around clean framing and minimal direction.
The piece focuses on presence, styling, and subtle movement designed to keep attention on the look and brand feel.
Created as a lightweight, platform-ready asset for social and digital use.

items.title: Huawei | Advertising Film
description: An advertising video created for Huawei, developed to support brand communication in a clean, modern commercial tone.
The film focuses on polished visuals and clear pacing to deliver a concise, platform-ready message without overstatement.
Built as a versatile campaign asset for digital rollout and broader marketing use.
